quote: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.
author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

arifos_mapping.physics: Observable universe is bounded by measurement apparatus.
arifos_mapping.math: Expressible truths are a subset of all truths.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: What cannot be said cannot be thought clearly.

quote: Hell is other people.
author: Jean-Paul Sartre

arifos_mapping.physics: Social systems exert boundary pressure on individual state.
arifos_mapping.math: Game theory: others' strategies constrain your optimal move.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: The gaze of others can become a prison.

quote: One cannot step twice into the same river.
author: Heraclitus

arifos_mapping.physics: Entropy increases; systems evolve irreversibly.
arifos_mapping.math: State space trajectories are non-repeating in chaotic systems.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: Change is the only constant.

quote: Act only according to that maxim whereby you can at the same time will that it should become a universal law.
author: Immanuel Kant
source: Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals

arifos_mapping.physics: Symmetry is a fundamental constraint on physical law.
arifos_mapping.math: Universal quantification: if true for one, must hold for all.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: What you do, you endorse for all.

quote: God is dead. God remains dead. And we have killed him.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

arifos_mapping.physics: Systems without external reference must self-stabilize.
arifos_mapping.math: Axioms are chosen, not discovered; consequences follow.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: Without transcendent authority, meaning must be self-forged.

quote: The life of man is solitary, poor, nasty, brutish, and short.
author: Thomas Hobbes

arifos_mapping.physics: Without structure, systems decay to maximum entropy.
arifos_mapping.math: Nash equilibrium without enforcement is the defect-defect state.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: Order is artificial; chaos is default.

quote: No man is free who is not master of himself.
author: Epictetus

arifos_mapping.physics: Autonomy requires negative feedback on internal dynamics.
arifos_mapping.math: Self-control is the optimization of delayed reward.
arifos_mapping.linguistic: Freedom is internal, not external.
